subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Thy call hath attained the honor of being heard, and the gaze of God from the direction of the Most Great Prison is turned toward thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ندایت بشرف اصغا فائز و لحاظ الله از شطر سجن اعظم بتو متوجه اگر لذت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @development of capacity and readiness
